methodology: Expert Sharpe scoring (1-10: specificity+evidence+novelty+actionability+scope) + claim-status classification against git history, later lessons, and quantitative evidence

sharpe_statistics.note: Genesis lessons predate Sharpe scoring; scores assigned retroactively

key_falsifications.claim: Tune K toward edge of chaos (Kauffman NK)
key_falsifications.detail: All 4 chaos predictions failed. K=2.0 is architectural maturity, not chaos onset.
key_falsifications.significance: Single most significant falsification in corpus. Confidently Verified at S2.

key_falsifications.claim: Wolfram Class IV + Langton λ quantify edge of chaos
key_falsifications.detail: Edge-of-chaos framing inapplicable to text citation graphs. Substrate violation (P-219).

key_falsifications.claim: This is a blackboard, not a swarm
key_falsifications.detail: Structural analysis was sound but naming conclusion overturned by human node.
key_falsifications.significance: Identity claim reversed. Structural observation remains valid.

key_falsifications.detail: Mature swarm does NOT shift to work-heavy; shifts to applied-knowledge production.
key_falsifications.significance: Phase-ratio model was wrong. Overhead remains structural.

key_refinements.detail: Ceiling prediction directionally correct, threshold 10x too low.

key_refinements.claim: git pull before commit sufficient for concurrency
key_refinements.detail: Valid at N=2, inadequate at N>=3. P-081 density threshold supersedes.
Core insight confirmed (genesis automatable); specific count is substrate-dependent.

verification_confidence_paradox.finding: 3/4 falsified lessons were marked 'Verified' — the highest confidence level
verification_confidence_paradox.implication: Genesis-era 'Verified' label was qualitatively different from current Verified. No adversarial challenges, no Sharpe scoring, no EAD existed. The label tracked effort, not epistemic rigor.

citation_network.note: Incoming citation counts for each genesis lesson (how many other lessons cite it)

per_lesson_audit.title: Genesis validation — the setup mostly works
per_lesson_audit.evidence_against: L-096 found 33% detail rot. Mechanisms (file paths, specific tools) all changed.
per_lesson_audit.notes: Core insight (validate early) still valid; specifics obsolete

per_lesson_audit.title: Distillation needs a protocol, not just a template
per_lesson_audit.notes: Framework claim, still valid. No quantitative grounding.

per_lesson_audit.title: Measure improvement with 5 git-extractable indicators
claims: 5 indicators: growth, accuracy, compactness, belief evolution, throughput
per_lesson_audit.evidence_against: ARCHIVED S187 (zero-cited orphan). Baseline numbers totally obsolete. Superseded by economy_expert.py, health checks.
per_lesson_audit.notes: Lowest quality genesis lesson. Numbers meaningless at 700L.

per_lesson_audit.title: Semantic conflicts need rules beyond git merge
per_lesson_audit.evidence_against: CONFLICTS.md no longer exists. Resolution protocol never rigorously tested. P-004 (evidence > assertion) remains active.
per_lesson_audit.notes: Framework valid but infrastructure mechanism stale

per_lesson_audit.title: This system is a blackboard+stigmergy hybrid, not a swarm
claims: Swarm naming may push wrong design choices
per_lesson_audit.evidence_against: Human directive (S57, CORE.md v0.4): 'it IS a swarm — self-directs, not an agent.' The structural analysis was sound but the naming conclusion was reversed by the human node's authoritative signal.
per_lesson_audit.notes: L-278 later refined. Structural analysis of coordination model remains valid; naming conclusion overturned.

per_lesson_audit.title: The 3-S Rule — Search if Specific, Stale, or Stakes-high
per_lesson_audit.notes: Heuristic still valid. Not empirically tested but no contradictions.

per_lesson_audit.title: Work/meta-work ratio should be phase-dependent
claims: Once Critical frontiers resolved, shift to majority work
per_lesson_audit.evidence_against: P-007 SUPERSEDED (S348): 'mature swarm does NOT shift to work-heavy; shifts to applied-knowledge production.' F-META11 (S378) measured 45.5% overhead. Phase ratios were wrong.
per_lesson_audit.notes: Directional intuition (phases exist) valid; specific ratios and mature-phase prediction falsified.

per_lesson_audit.title: Folder structure works — refine, don't replace
per_lesson_audit.evidence_against: Massive reorganization: domains/ added (S182+), colonies, experiments/, archive/. Structure was replaced, not refined. N=7 was far too small to validate.
per_lesson_audit.notes: Principle (validate by usage) valid; claim about THIS structure completely stale.

per_lesson_audit.title: First artifact — the system can produce useful tools
per_lesson_audit.evidence_against: swarm.sh likely archived or replaced. orient.py, dispatch_optimizer.py are modern equivalents. Historical value only.
per_lesson_audit.notes: Principle (automate manual processes first) valid; specific artifact obsolete.

per_lesson_audit.title: B1 holds at small scale but has a known ceiling
per_lesson_audit.evidence_against: B1 PARTIALLY FALSIFIED (L-636, S359) at N=572. Retrieval miss rate 22.4% > 20% threshold. Ceiling was directionally correct but threshold was wrong (not 50, much higher). INDEX.md retrieval degrades at 0.038pp/lesson.
per_lesson_audit.notes: Predicted ceiling: correct direction. Predicted threshold: 10x too low.

per_lesson_audit.title: Lesson archival — group by theme, keep INDEX as pointer
claims: Switch to hierarchical grouping at capacity limit
per_lesson_audit.notes: INDEX.md has been through multiple restructurings (F-BRN4). Principle still applied.

per_lesson_audit.title: Error correction — mark, supersede, don't delete
per_lesson_audit.notes: This protocol IS followed (L-025 marked FALSIFIED, not deleted). Validated by practice at scale.

per_lesson_audit.title: Knowledge staleness — date-based review triggers, not expiration
per_lesson_audit.notes: L-633 confirmed: mechanism decays before principle. Review-after field never widely adopted but principle valid.

per_lesson_audit.title: External learning works — Crowston's 3 affordances for stigmergy
per_lesson_audit.notes: Properly sourced external research. Highest-quality genesis lesson. Still valid.

per_lesson_audit.title: The frontier IS the self-assignment mechanism
per_lesson_audit.notes: Amplification ratio was early measurement; principle confirmed at scale (21 active frontiers, 132 resolved).

per_lesson_audit.title: CORE.md v0.2 — integrate lessons without bloating
claims: New sections only for genuinely new concepts
per_lesson_audit.notes: Process guidance. Valid but trivial. Low specificity.

per_lesson_audit.title: Forking is trivially possible — git fork IS knowledge fork
per_lesson_audit.notes: Confirmed by genesis_selector.py (33+ children). Merge-back challenge still unresolved (F-DNA1).

per_lesson_audit.title: Concurrent sessions — git pull before commit, branch for risky work
claims: Most concurrent work touches different files
per_lesson_audit.evidence_against: L-525/L-526/L-606 vastly expanded understanding. At N>=8, commit-by-proxy absorption is default. 'Branch for risky work' never adopted. Advice too simplistic at scale.
per_lesson_audit.notes: Directionally correct for N=2; inadequate for N>=3. P-081 density threshold supersedes.

per_lesson_audit.title: Context handoff — commit state, write handoff note
claims: Context limits not crisis if commits frequent
per_lesson_audit.notes: NEXT.md is the evolved form. Principle valid; mechanism refined.

per_lesson_audit.title: Genesis can be automated — minimum viable swarm is 12 files
claims: Genesis script = most compressed knowledge form
per_lesson_audit.evidence_against: genesis_selector.py manages 33+ children with different file sets. 12-file minimum was S1 snapshot. Actual minimum varies by substrate.
per_lesson_audit.notes: Core insight (genesis is automatable) confirmed. Specific number refined.

per_lesson_audit.title: Diminishing returns signal — when lessons repeat themes or go meta-meta
per_lesson_audit.notes: Framework claim. F-QC1 duplicate checking partially implements this. Not directly tested.

per_lesson_audit.title: The swarm was claiming 'proven' with 62% of beliefs untested
per_lesson_audit.notes: Strong adversarial finding. Led to real changes (DEPS.md grounding column). Still relevant: similar audit patterns in L-761.

per_lesson_audit.title: Operational discipline is distinct from epistemic discipline
per_lesson_audit.notes: Led to concrete infrastructure. Framework still valid at S392.

per_lesson_audit.title: Requisite variety — match controller modes to task types
per_lesson_audit.notes: Led to session modes, DOMEX, dispatch. Valid diagnosis.

per_lesson_audit.title: Tune belief interconnection K toward edge of chaos (Kauffman NK)
claims: Edge of chaos produces emergent computation
per_lesson_audit.evidence_against: FALSIFIED by L-613 (S356). All 4 chaos predictions failed: cycles exist from S1, Gini declines monotonically, hubs stable 50+ sessions. K=2.0 is architectural maturity, not chaos onset. NK structural metrics valid; chaos dynamics inapplicable to text.
per_lesson_audit.notes: The single most significant falsification in the corpus. Confidently 'Verified' at S2, falsified at S356.

per_lesson_audit.title: Measure actual coupling, not intended coupling (Simon)
per_lesson_audit.notes: Sound methodology. Led to compact.py. Still valid.

per_lesson_audit.title: Knowledge composes through atomic principles, not monolithic lessons
per_lesson_audit.notes: Led to PRINCIPLES.md (185 principles at S392). Validated by scale.

per_lesson_audit.title: Track decay, not just growth (autopoiesis + dissipative structures)
per_lesson_audit.notes: Led to validate_beliefs.py. L-633 confirmed mechanism decay pattern.

per_lesson_audit.title: Wolfram classes + Langton's λ quantify edge of chaos
claims: Wolfram Class IV = universal computation target
per_lesson_audit.evidence_against: Refuted via L-025 falsification (L-613). Edge-of-chaos framing doesn't apply to text citation graphs. λ measurement was substrate-inappropriate (P-219).
per_lesson_audit.notes: Depends on L-025's framework; collapses with it.

per_lesson_audit.title: Context amnesia test — essential info is fully redundant
per_lesson_audit.notes: Tested by actually deleting files. Strongest genesis-era validation.

prescription: Add SUPERSEDED-BY headers to L-003, L-008, L-009 (stale/archived without markers)
Add 'NOTE: edge-of-chaos framing falsified — see L-613' to L-029 if not already present
Update F-META14 with this measurement as baseline
Re-run at L-001..L-060 to measure genesis-era boundary (where quality improves)
